to trigger a structured series of contextualizing questions that will guide the thread’s focus. These prompts should help them clarify their goals, ideas, and intended outputs. Similarly, the session end command (`::S4VE.io]|`) should initiate a comprehensive review and state-saving process that collects relevant data, unresolved questions, and ensures that the thread is properly archived and not abandoned or lost.
